    About Date Filters

    The Start Date and End Date fields allow you to filter the Date/Time Column in Active Tab.

    • Start Date: shows only records on or after this date.
    • End Date: shows only records on or before this date.
    • You can leave one field blank - for example, only pick an End Date to show everything up to that date.
    • Future dates are disabled, and you can only go back 1 years.
    • Click Clear in Calendar Widget to Clear out selected Dates

    This helps you quickly narrow results to the timeframe you want.
